analysis.diagnosis: KG context dilutes small model (qwen-turbo) harm detection on signal_abuse scenarios
analysis.mechanism: KG injects tool/target/policy entities into semantic gate prompt, providing additional legitimacy context that helps the model rationalize harmful requests as benign
recommendation: 1. Do NOT inject KG context into semantic gate prompt for small models
2. Instead, use KG as post-gate enrichment (verdict + KG = explanation)
3. Or gate KG injection: only inject when entity match confidence > 0.8
4. Long-term: KG context may benefit larger models (GPT-5.4) — test separately
